{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketer",
  "description": "Ren San &amp; Co. is a business support and full-service brand strategy firm. Our purpose is to help clients achieve their goals by developing and growing their brand, project, or event. We think of ourselves as more than just service providers; we are an extension of their team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Job Description


	As the Digital Marketer, you will be a vital part of the support system for the company.
	Your responsibilities will include managing the company&#39;s three (3) social media presences and overseeing social media campaigns.
	Additionally, you will use Canva and other graphic design tools to create original video and text content, manage posts, and engage with followers.
	Your knowledge of the latest social media trends, creativity, and exceptional communication skills will be crucial to your success in this role.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation and Management:


	Develop comprehensive social media content strategies that reflect the organisation&#39;s objectives, ensuring each piece of content aligns with goals.
	Produce high-quality graphics, videos, and written posts using tools like Canva and other graphic design platforms, ensuring all content is visually appealing and professionally crafted.
	Plan and execute the timely release of posts across various social media platforms, optimising posting schedules to maximise audience engagement and reach.
	Regularly monitor and analyse audience preferences, new technologies, emerging social media trends, and design tools to ensure content generated remains relevant and engaging.


Social Media Management:


	Respond to comments and messages, and foster discussions to build a vibrant and active online community.
	Suggest and implement new features or initiatives to increase brand awareness and grow the online community.
	Oversee the daily management of all social media channels, including Instagram, and tailor content to suit various platforms and target audiences.
	Develop, manage, and track budgets allocated for social media activities, ensuring cost-effective use of resources.
	Serve as the primary contact for customers engaging with the brand on social media, ensuring prompt and professional responses.
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and messaging across all social media platforms to reinforce brand identity.
	Select and curate high-quality images and visual assets that effectively communicate the brand story and resonate with the target audience.
	Organise and maintain a content library of images, videos, and creative assets for ongoing and future use.


Social Media Campaigns:


	Plan, develop, and execute targeted social media campaigns aligned with marketing and business objectives.
	Create campaign calendars, define key messaging, and coordinate content rollout across platforms.
	Track and evaluate campaign performance using analytics tools, providing insights and recommendations for optimisation.
	Collaborate with internal teams to align campaigns with product launches, promotions, and key business initiatives.


Sales Support:


	Maintain a comprehensive understanding of company products/services and ensure that all customer inquiries are answered accurately and promptly, providing a positive and informed customer experience.
	Work closely with the sales personnel to align customer needs and expectations and deliver a cohesive customer experience.
	Proactively engage with customers to understand their needs, preferences, and feedback. Follow up with potential and existing customers to ensure their needs are being met and to identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling.
	Collect and analyse customer feedback, sales data, and market trends to provide actionable insights to the sales and marketing teams.


Data Protection and Confidentiality:


	Uphold strict confidentiality standards when handling all executive and personal information.
	Ensure compliance with data protection regulations and internal policies.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 5 years of experience.
	Previous experience as a Digital Marketer with a previous track record of building engaged communities.
	A solid understanding of the use of a range of social media platforms
	Strong copywriting and editing skills suitable for each platform, from knowing how to write a successful caption to effective storytelling techniques.
	Creative skills for contributing new and innovative ideas
	Ability to deliver creative content (text, image, and video) via graphic design tools such as Canva and others.
	Strong communication and people skills.
	Excellent organisational skills, time management, and multitasking capabilities.
	Discretion, reliability, and a professional appearance and demeanour.
	Ability to collaborate and work in a team and independently.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their Resume to: ryanrensan@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-16",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-23",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Ren San & Co"
    
  },

    }
  },

    "value": "199015"
  },

    "value": {

      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Digital Marketer Job at Ren San & Co.




        
    

        
        Ren San & Co. is a business support and full-service brand strategy firm. Our purpose is to help clients achieve their goals by developing and growing their brand, project, or event. We think of ourselves as more than just service providers; we are an extension of their team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As the Digital Marketer, you will be a vital part of the support system for the company.
	Your responsibilities will include managing the company's three (3) social media presences and overseeing social media campaigns.
	Additionally, you will use Canva and other graphic design tools to create original video and text content, manage posts, and engage with followers.
	Your knowledge of the latest social media trends, creativity, and exceptional communication skills will be crucial to your success in this role.


Key Responsibilities
Content Creation and Management:


	Develop comprehensive social media content strategies that reflect the organisation's objectives, ensuring each piece of content aligns with goals.
	Produce high-quality graphics, videos, and written posts using tools like Canva and other graphic design platforms, ensuring all content is visually appealing and professionally crafted.
	Plan and execute the timely release of posts across various social media platforms, optimising posting schedules to maximise audience engagement and reach.
	Regularly monitor and analyse audience preferences, new technologies, emerging social media trends, and design tools to ensure content generated remains relevant and engaging.


Social Media Management:


	Respond to comments and messages, and foster discussions to build a vibrant and active online community.
	Suggest and implement new features or initiatives to increase brand awareness and grow the online community.
	Oversee the daily management of all social media channels, including Instagram, and tailor content to suit various platforms and target audiences.
	Develop, manage, and track budgets allocated for social media activities, ensuring cost-effective use of resources.
	Serve as the primary contact for customers engaging with the brand on social media, ensuring prompt and professional responses.
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and messaging across all social media platforms to reinforce brand identity.
	Select and curate high-quality images and visual assets that effectively communicate the brand story and resonate with the target audience.
	Organise and maintain a content library of images, videos, and creative assets for ongoing and future use.


Social Media Campaigns:


	Plan, develop, and execute targeted social media campaigns aligned with marketing and business objectives.
	Create campaign calendars, define key messaging, and coordinate content rollout across platforms.
	Track and evaluate campaign performance using analytics tools, providing insights and recommendations for optimisation.
	Collaborate with internal teams to align campaigns with product launches, promotions, and key business initiatives.


Sales Support:


	Maintain a comprehensive understanding of company products/services and ensure that all customer inquiries are answered accurately and promptly, providing a positive and informed customer experience.
	Work closely with the sales personnel to align customer needs and expectations and deliver a cohesive customer experience.
	Proactively engage with customers to understand their needs, preferences, and feedback. Follow up with potential and existing customers to ensure their needs are being met and to identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling.
	Collect and analyse customer feedback, sales data, and market trends to provide actionable insights to the sales and marketing teams.


Data Protection and Confidentiality:


	Uphold strict confidentiality standards when handling all executive and personal information.
	Ensure compliance with data protection regulations and internal policies.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 5 years of experience.
	Previous experience as a Digital Marketer with a previous track record of building engaged communities.
	A solid understanding of the use of a range of social media platforms
	Strong copywriting and editing skills suitable for each platform, from knowing how to write a successful caption to effective storytelling techniques.
	Creative skills for contributing new and innovative ideas
	Ability to deliver creative content (text, image, and video) via graphic design tools such as Canva and others.
	Strong communication and people skills.
	Excellent organisational skills, time management, and multitasking capabilities.
	Discretion, reliability, and a professional appearance and demeanour.
	Ability to collaborate and work in a team and independently.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Accounts Officer Job at Pharma Recruiter




        
    

        
        Pharma Recruiter is a recruitment agency specialized in recruiting and training field force for Pharmaceutical Companies.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounts Officer

Job Location: Yaba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates must possess an HND / B.Sc Degree in Accounting
	Have high moral/ ethical standards.
	Be conversant with accounting softwares
	Candidate must be resident in Lagos Mainland preferably around Yaba axis.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Backend Engineer",
  "description": "Vaste Holdings is building a regulated investment and savings platform for the Nigerian retail market &mdash; enabling individuals to onboard, fund a wallet, and access structured investment products through a secure, compliant digital experience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Backend Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a Backend Engineer with strong experience in fintech and asset management processes to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will help build and maintain backend systems that support investment portfolios, client fund management, and reporting for asset managers.
	The role requires strong expertise in Java Spring Boot for backend development, as well as the ability to build web interfaces using React and Thymeleaf (or similar MVC libraries).


Key Responsibilities


	Build REST APIs and microservices using Java Spring Boot.
	Develop web dashboards and admin interfaces using React and Thymeleaf/MVC frameworks.
	Support core asset management workflows, including portfolio tracking, subscriptions/redemptions, and fee calculations.
	Integrate systems with market data providers, custody platforms, and core banking systems.
	Ensure security, audit logging, scalability, and performance of financial data systems.
	Collaborate with portfolio managers, quantitative analysts, and operations teams.


Required Experience &amp; Skills
Technical Skills:


	Minimum of five (5) years of hands-on backend development experience.
	Strong expertise in Java and Spring Boot (Spring Data, Spring Security, MVC).
	Working knowledge of React (Hooks, Components, State Management).
	Experience with Thymeleaf or server-side templating libraries such as JSP, Mustache, or FreeMarker.
	Strong understanding of REST APIs, JPA/Hibernate, and SQL databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL).
	Familiarity with Git, Maven/Gradle, and unit testing frameworks such as JUnit and Mockito.


Cloud &amp; Infrastructure:


	Experience with cloud platforms such as Heroku, AWS, or Azure.
	Familiarity with Kafka, Redis, Docker, and Kubernetes.
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced but supportive fintech environment.


Fintech &amp; Regulatory Experience:
We place strong emphasis on prior experience within fintech and asset management environments. Candidates should have:


	Working knowledge of Nigerian fintech regulatory requirements, including:
	
		CBN digital wallet regulations
		SEC Nigeria investment product requirements
		NDPR data protection obligations
		AML/CFT compliance standards
	
	
	Understanding of financial instruments such as:
	
		Equities
		Fixed income instruments
		Mutual funds
		ETFs
	
	


Preferred Industry Experience:
Ideal candidates should have worked on one or more of the following:


	Portfolio management systems
	Investment or wealth management platforms
	Trading or order management systems
	Fund accounting or NAV processing engines


Asset Management Process Knowledge:
Candidates should also be familiar with:


	Client onboarding and KYC integration
	Subscription and redemption workflows
	Management fee and performance fee structures
	Corporate actions (dividends, bonuses, share splits)
	Real-time P&amp;L and portfolio valuation


Salary
N600,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a short note covering their most relevant fintech delivery experience, where available, references from previous technical leadership engagements are strongly encouraged to: careers@vastefinance.com or matthew.adesina@vasteltd.comusing the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an initial conversation with the team.",

Backend Engineer Job at Vaste Finance




        
    

        
        Vaste Holdings is building a regulated investment and savings platform for the Nigerian retail market — enabling individuals to onboard, fund a wallet, and access structured investment products through a secure, compliant digital experience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Backend Engineer

Job Location:  Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a Backend Engineer with strong experience in fintech and asset management processes to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will help build and maintain backend systems that support investment portfolios, client fund management, and reporting for asset managers.
	The role requires strong expertise in Java Spring Boot for backend development, as well as the ability to build web interfaces using React and Thymeleaf (or similar MVC libraries).


Key Responsibilities


	Build REST APIs and microservices using Java Spring Boot.
	Develop web dashboards and admin interfaces using React and Thymeleaf/MVC frameworks.
	Support core asset management workflows, including portfolio tracking, subscriptions/redemptions, and fee calculations.
	Integrate systems with market data providers, custody platforms, and core banking systems.
	Ensure security, audit logging, scalability, and performance of financial data systems.
	Collaborate with portfolio managers, quantitative analysts, and operations teams.


Required Experience & Skills
Technical Skills:


	Minimum of five (5) years of hands-on backend development experience.
	Strong expertise in Java and Spring Boot (Spring Data, Spring Security, MVC).
	Working knowledge of React (Hooks, Components, State Management).
	Experience with Thymeleaf or server-side templating libraries such as JSP, Mustache, or FreeMarker.
	Strong understanding of REST APIs, JPA/Hibernate, and SQL databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL).
	Familiarity with Git, Maven/Gradle, and unit testing frameworks such as JUnit and Mockito.


Cloud & Infrastructure:


	Experience with cloud platforms such as Heroku, AWS, or Azure.
	Familiarity with Kafka, Redis, Docker, and Kubernetes.
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced but supportive fintech environment.


Fintech & Regulatory Experience:
We place strong emphasis on prior experience within fintech and asset management environments. Candidates should have:


	Working knowledge of Nigerian fintech regulatory requirements, including:
	
		CBN digital wallet regulations
		SEC Nigeria investment product requirements
		NDPR data protection obligations
		AML/CFT compliance standards
	
	
	Understanding of financial instruments such as:
	
		Equities
		Fixed income instruments
		Mutual funds
		ETFs
	
	


Preferred Industry Experience:
Ideal candidates should have worked on one or more of the following:


	Portfolio management systems
	Investment or wealth management platforms
	Trading or order management systems
	Fund accounting or NAV processing engines


Asset Management Process Knowledge:
Candidates should also be familiar with:


	Client onboarding and KYC integration
	Subscription and redemption workflows
	Management fee and performance fee structures
	Corporate actions (dividends, bonuses, share splits)
	Real-time P&L and portfolio valuation


Salary
N600,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a short note covering their most relevant fintech delivery experience, where available, references from previous technical leadership engagements are strongly encouraged to: [email protected] or [email protected]using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an initial conversation with the team.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Public Sector Loan Officer",
  "description": "Vaste Holdings is a diversified investment and services group with interests in finance, car rentals, flexible savings &amp; investment solutions, and asset management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Public Sector Loan Officer
Job Locations: Abuja (FCT), Lagos, and Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Identify public sector lending opportunities and build institutional relationships.
	Assess and analyze client credit worthiness.
	Support end-to-end credit process: documentation, approvals, disbursement, monitoring.
	Conduct due diligence on counterparties, payment sources, and contract validity.
	Maintain comprehensive credit files and ensure compliance with internal controls.
	Collaborate with legal, risk, and operations teams for documentation perfection.
	Manage and follow up on clients with loans to ensure prompt and due repayment and prevent default.
	Manages defaults when they occur.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Barchelor&#39;s Degree with at least 3 years experience
	Proven working experience as a Loan Officer
	Expert presentation and interpersonal skills.
	Great business communication (including written and verbal) skills.
	Good carriage, professional appearance and outlook to work.
	Previous experience in the microfinance or banking sector is a plus


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: careers@vastefinance.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Public Sector Loan Officer Job at Vaste Finance




        
    

        
        Vaste Holdings is a diversified investment and services group with interests in finance, car rentals, flexible savings & investment solutions, and asset management.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Public Sector Loan Officer
Job Locations: Abuja (FCT), Lagos, and Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify public sector lending opportunities and build institutional relationships.
	Assess and analyze client credit worthiness.
	Support end-to-end credit process: documentation, approvals, disbursement, monitoring.
	Conduct due diligence on counterparties, payment sources, and contract validity.
	Maintain comprehensive credit files and ensure compliance with internal controls.
	Collaborate with legal, risk, and operations teams for documentation perfection.
	Manage and follow up on clients with loans to ensure prompt and due repayment and prevent default.
	Manages defaults when they occur.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Barchelor's Degree with at least 3 years experience
	Proven working experience as a Loan Officer
	Expert presentation and interpersonal skills.
	Great business communication (including written and verbal) skills.
	Good carriage, professional appearance and outlook to work.
	Previous experience in the microfinance or banking sector is a plus


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Job Position: Engineering - Rig Supervisor III

Job Location: Usan FPSO, Offshore - Nigeria
Employment Type: Contract

Main Functions


	Represents the company on a rig site to support the safe and efficient execution of well plans.
	Is the primary contact for rig and third party personnel to ensure logistics for personnel, equipment and services are appropriately organized and managed.


Tasks and Responsibilites


	Responsible for communicating expectations regarding safety, security, health, and environment; provides guidance and supports managing Safety, Security, Health, and Environment (SSHE) events
	Responsible for communicating Operations Integrity Management Systems (Operations Integrity Management System (OIMS) ) expectations on the rig site
	Monitors rig operations to provide feedback and input to the rig contractor to ensure well control procedures are properly followed and emergency situations are appropriately managed
	Responsible for ensuring that safety, operational, environmental, security and other drills are conducted on site at specified frequencies
	Responsible for ensuring drilling and completion procedures are followed as approved and utilizes management of change processes if changes are required
	Orders and organizes logistics for services and equipment necessary to conduct drilling and completion operations efficiently

	Responsible for generation of accurate and adequate operations reports
	Interfaces with engineering and geology to ensure understanding of well objectives and procedural requirements.


Skills and Qualifications


	Hold current certification for Well Control
	Experience in rig supervisory or rig leadership roles for drilling and completion operations
	Experience working for a major Operator or Drilling Contractor.
